title: Refined Storage - Curios Integration
description: An optional integration mod adds support for Curios on NeoForge, providing two dedicated Curios slots for Refined Storage.
body:
An optional integration mod adds support for **Curios on NeoForge**, providing two dedicated Curios slots for the following Refined Storage tools:

- [Wireless Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/wireless-networking/wireless-grid.html)  
- [Creative Wireless Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/wireless-networking/creative-wireless-grid.html)  
- [Wireless Crafting Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/wireless-networking/wireless-crafting-grid.html)  
- [Creative Wireless Crafting Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/wireless-networking/creative-wireless-crafting-grid.html)  
- [Portable Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/portable-grid.html)  
- [Creative Portable Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/creative-portable-grid.html)

You can combine this with a keybinding to quickly open these tools while equipped.

![Curios slots](https://refinedmods.com/curios.1faca87d.png)
